name: LED GU10 Bulb – 7 Watt | 6500K | 500 Lumens
description: Features Energy Efficient: Consumes only 7W of power while providing brightness equivalent to a 60W incandescent bulb—ideal for reducing energy costs. Versatile Installation: GU10 base fits standard fixtures such as track lighting, recessed cans, and accent lighting. Bright & Cool Light: Delivers crisp, clear illumination with a 6500K color temperature for a daylight-like appearance. Long Lifespan & Low Consumption: Built for long-term performance and lower electricity usage. Dimmable & Certified: Offers smooth dimming compatibility and is UL certified for safety and reliability.
short_desc: Product Specifications Wattage: 7W Color Temperature: 6500K Incandescent Equivalent: 60W Luminous Efficacy: 85 LM/Watt Lumen Output: 600 Lumens Input Voltage: AC 100–130V Color Rendering Index (CRI): >80 Base Type: GU10 Beam Angle: 40° Dimmable: Yes Application: Indoor Use Certification: UL Listed Warranty: 1 Year
